subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! The tongue of the Wronged One beareth witness to Thy oneness and Thy singleness, and to that which Thou hast revealed through Thy Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی یشهد لسان المظلوم بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و بما انزلته من قلمک الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power of prayer, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
